title: calanthe turneri
intro: Calanthe turneri, also known as the Turners calanthe, is a species of orchid native to the Himalayas and parts of Southeast Asia, recognized by its distinctive white and purple flowers. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Calanthe turneri include reducing inflammation, alleviating coughs and colds, and acting as a natural antiseptic. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a powder to be added to traditional remedies, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential.
